next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR and serology
Send cerebrospinal fluid for fungal and mycobacterial cultures
Perform serum and cerebrospinal fluid serologic testing for Gnathostoma spinigerum
Obtain MRI of the brain and entire spine with and without gadolinium
Maintain high-dose corticosteroids while awaiting specific infectious workup
Consult infectious disease and neurology specialists
